private async Task<Guid> CreateEmailAsync(
    Entity senderParty,
    List<Entity> recipientParties,
    string errorEmailSubject,
    string errorEmailBody,
    Guid logId,
    CancellationToken cancellationToken)
{
    var email = new Entity("email");

    email["subject"] = errorEmailSubject;
    email["description"] = errorEmailBody;
    email["from"] = new EntityCollection(new List<Entity> { senderParty });
    email["to"] = new EntityCollection(recipientParties);
    email["regardingobjectid"] = new EntityReference("tpc_logs", logId);

    return await _dataverseRepo.CreateAsync(email, cancellationToken);
}
-----------------
Guid emailId = await CreateEmailAsync(
    senderParty,
    recipientParties,
    errorEmailSubject,
    errorEmailBody,
    logId,
    cancellationToken);

_logger.LogInformation(
    "DIA notification email record created. EmailId: {EmailId}, LogId: {LogId}, Title: {LogErrorTitle}.",
    emailId,
    logId,
    logErrorTitle);

Create Dataverse email record for DIA exception notification
